message:
Add Renderable impls for str/String and fix clippy warning

- Implement Renderable for str and String types
- Add Renderable impls for Syntax, Markdown, Json (feature-gated)
- Fix clippy redundant_closure_for_method_calls warning
- Add golden_outputs/ to gitignore (test artifacts)
